entry.name: AstraMilitarum/HeroesDescription
entry.value: Building that produces heroes and psykers as well as generates influence and increases loyalty.

entry.name: AstraMilitarum/HeroesFlavor
entry.value: Far more than a mere statue, this great metal eagle was cast from the molten remains of space-faring vessels, and serves as an inspiration for those nearby. The Imperial troops that fight under the Aquila's ceaseless vigil find a new determination welling in their hearts, knowing that they are the last in a line of heroes that stretches across the stars.

entry.name: AstraMilitarum/PsykersDescription
entry.value: Sub Building that allows to produce psykers in Aquilla shrines.

entry.name: AstraMilitarum/PsykersFlavor
entry.value: Whilst the warpstorm rages, the peacetime use of psykers—as astropaths, for long-range communication—is pointless. Similarly, without being able to reach the Black Ships, unwanted psykers can't be transported to Terra for sacrifice at the Golden Throne. Instead, most are executed, with a select few drafted into Imperial service as Sanctioned Psykers.
